plan_metadata.name: Feature Del Resource Group And Reprovision For tab

steps.description: Click on the "Declarative Agent" option within the "New Project" dropdown menu to create an agent using instructions and actions.
Click on the "General Teams Agent" option within the dropdown menu titled "Teams Agent or App Using Teams AI Library" at coordinates (474, 210).
Click on the dropdown option "Tab" under the "Teams Capability" menu in the Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit interface.
Click the "Default folder /home/vscode/AgentsToolkitProjects" option in the workspace folder selection dialog within Visual Studio Code, under the Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit extension interface.
Press the F1 key in Visual Studio Code to open the Command Palette, while viewing the Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit sidebar and the OUTPUT panel showing provision lifecycle messages.
Type the text "provision" into the Visual Studio Code command palette (top-center input box), within the Microsoft 365 Agents extension workspace.

Click the "Microsoft 365 Agents: Provision" command in the Visual Studio Code command palette, highlighted by the red crosshair under the search input ">provision", to initiate the provisioning process within the Microsoft 365 Agents extension.

Click the "Provision" button in the Azure account provisioning confirmation dialog within the Microsoft Visual Studio Code interface. The button confirms resource provisioning using the listed accounts.
Press the F1 key to open the command palette in Visual Studio Code, within the Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit extension interface on the "Provision" stage.
Press the F1 key in the Visual Studio Code interface to open the command palette, within the Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit extension workspace.
Type text 'notifications:showno' into the VS Code Command Palette input field.
Click the "Notifications: Show" command suggestion in the Visual Studio Code command palette, located just below the input field where ">notifications:shown" is typed.
@assertion  there is an error message visible in the screenshot.
